generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor collecting raw point cloud data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawPointCloud
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera collecting depth and visual data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed into motor voltage commands"
]

instance LiDARRawPointCloud : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance TranslatedLiDARData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized and unit-converted LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawPointCloud
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance TranslatedDepthData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized and unit-converted depth camera data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance TranslatedVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized and unit-converted ego vehicle speed and steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks generated from point cloud clustering and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TranslatedLiDARData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed and steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TranslatedVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing object tracks and ego vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData, VehicleStateData
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering of raw LiDAR point clouds with Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK, ROS2Middleware
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Determines lead vehicle and computes following speed based on distance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack50SDK, ROS2Middleware
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 for middleware communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware-accelerated sensor processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance PythonDevelopment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python for development and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CppDevelopment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for control algorithm design"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and control algorithm design"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ISO23247Standard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 digital twin framework standard implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state visualization, projected driving path, detected object tracks, data saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTracksVisualization, DataSaving, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading ACC system functions (lead vehicle detection, desired speed calculation, actuation commands) to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, DesiredSpeedCalculation, ActuationCommandGeneration
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to enable/disable ACC, set speed, and issue emergency braking commands developers use for data collection"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableDisable, SpeedSetting, EmergencyBrakingCommand, DataCollectionForTroubleshooting
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle speed and steering angle"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected object tracks"
]

instance DataSaving : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving processed data to SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generating reports from stored data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of lead vehicle for adaptive cruise control"
]

instance DesiredSpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of desired speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ActuationCommandGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generating motor control commands for speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableDisable : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling or disabling Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedSetting : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting desired speed for adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Initiating emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataCollectionForTroubleshooting : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Collecting system data for developer troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataTranslationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for all data streams"
]

instance UserInterface3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance UserInterfaceControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control panel for enabling/disabling ACC, setting speed, and emergency braking"
]

instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical twin entity hosting resource-specific functions like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController
]

instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin entity hosting data processing and model execution"
    base:contains DataTranslationComponent, PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel, ACCModel, SQLDatabase
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User entity with interface for monitoring and control"
    base:contains UserInterface3DVisualization, UserInterfaceControlPanel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands, including ACC inputs, motor actuation, and steering servo commands, are processed by the Controlling FE. The Data Translation component serializes and translates these commands, which are then transmitted via ROS2 and UDP over Wi-Fi networks. Command validation, authentication, and execution confirmation mechanisms are not detailed in the document."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices to enable computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, as dictated by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA with three primary entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) mapped to hardware components. Each Functional Entity is implemented as a ROS2 package, with inter-component coordination via ROS2 nodes. The Physical Twin Entity deviates from ISO 23247 by encompassing general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking) rather than only resource-specific OME functions, and all entities are deployed on separate hardware for system-wide coordination."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin System utilizes ROS2 for intra-component communication within the Digital Twin entity and Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer for inter-entity communication. Requirement R7 mandates a maximum network latency of 100 ms. Bandwidth requirements, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not explicitly detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Each entity is deployed on separate hardware components, including NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputers for processing and external storage devices for data persistence. No cloud, on-premise, or edge-specific deployment model is explicitly stated beyond the hardware details."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247-2:2021 reference architecture defining Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities handle specific tasks such as data transformation, actuation, and user interfacing, with OPC Unified Architecture specified for interoperability implementation."
]
